sentences.arabic: يَتَطَوَّرُ الذَّكَاءُ الِاصْطِنَاعِيُّ بِشَكْلٍ سَرِيعٍ جِدًّا فِي هَذَا الْعَصْرِ.
sentences.translation: Vještačka inteligencija se veoma brzo razvija u ovom dobu.
sentences.translationEn: Artificial intelligence is developing very rapidly in this era.

sentences.arabic: تَعْمَلُ بَعْضُ الرُّوبُوتَاتِ الْآنَ فِي الْمَصَانِعِ وَالْمُسْتَشْفَيَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Neki roboti sada rade u fabrikama i bolnicama.
sentences.translationEn: Some robots now work in factories and hospitals.

sentences.arabic: يُمْكِنُ لِلْحَاسُوبِ أَنْ يَتَعَلَّمَ وَيَحِلَّ الْمُشْكِلَاتِ الصَّعْبَةَ بِنَفْسِهِ.
sentences.translation: Kompjuter može sam učiti i rješavati teške probleme.
sentences.translationEn: The computer can learn and solve difficult problems by itself.

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ التِّقْنِيَّةُ تُغَيِّرُ مُسْتَقْبَلَ الْعَمَلِ وَالْعُلُومِ.
sentences.translation: Ova tehnologija mijenja budućnost rada i nauke.
sentences.translationEn: This technology is changing the future of work and science.
